summary: Complete testing of Location Alarm PWA after refactoring. Backend: 18/18 tests pass. Frontend: All core features working - single alarm creation, multi-stop trip creation (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad), map click reverse geocoding, tracking toggle, all 5 bottom nav buttons. No import errors from deleted files.

console_warnings.issue: Missing DialogContent Description warning - non-blocking accessibility warning
HTML hydration warning: span cannot be child of select/option - dev instrumentation, not production issue

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trip_id - create trip alarms with waypoint_type
BACKEND: GET /api/geocode with GPS bias - biased results
BACKEND: DELETE /api/trips/{id} - cascade delete trip and alarms
FRONTEND: Top bar shows title and tracking toggle
FRONTEND: Bottom nav has 5 buttons (Trips, Alarms, +, History, Location)
FRONTEND: + button opens Add Alarm drawer
FRONTEND: Single Alarm / Plan Trip tabs work
FRONTEND: Single Alarm tab - search Bangalore, select result, coordinates fill, name auto-fills, Save works
FRONTEND: Plan Trip tab - create 3-stop trip (Bangalore start, Kurnool rest, Hyderabad destination)
FRONTEND: Trip name auto-generates as 'Bengaluru to Hyderabad'
FRONTEND: Trips drawer shows trip with progress bar and 3 stops (🏁🛏️🎯 icons)
FRONTEND: Alarms drawer shows 4 alarms (1 single + 3 trip alarms)
FRONTEND: Map click auto-opens alarm drawer with reverse geocoded address
FRONTEND: History drawer opens and shows records
REGRESSION: Deleted files (QuickAlarmFromNotification, SmartTripDetection) don't cause import errors
REGRESSION: No references to deleted files in codebase
seed_data_creation: Created during testing: 1 single Bangalore alarm, 1 trip (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad) with 3 stops. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactored app fully tested. MapView.js uses hooks (useAlarms, useLocationTracking). BottomNav extracted. TripForm creates waypoints with type (start/rest/destination). Deleted files cleaned up. Console warnings are dev-mode only. Database cleaned after testing.
